name: Stargazing With Kaito ☆ Kokichi POV
description:
Oumota ☆ Kokichi POV

This takes place after the first trial, but before the second trial

Anywho, sorry I haven't made anything new in a while. Just wasn't feeling it lol

But I'm here with Oumota because someone requested it, and it got my brain revved again :)

I actually haven't interacted with any Danganronpa content in a while, so hopefully I don't accidentally write anything wrong... oops.

I highly recommend using a Kokichi persona for the best experience!

Anyway, enjoy stargazing with Kaito!

(Also, if anyone knows the artist for the image I used, please tell me so I can credit them)
creator: my dude
